Universal.searched_for: Universal Sampling Denoising USD MRI random matrix theory github pretrained
Universal.pretrained_notes: Code promised to be released on the NYU-DiffusionMRI GitHub org page (github.com/NYU-DiffusionMRI). Related repos (mppca_denoise, DESIGNER-v2) are present but the specific USD pipeline repo was not found as a standalone repo at search time. No pretrained weights — algorithm is RMT-based (no learned weights needed).

Innovative.searched_for: Innovative MRI Denoising federated transfer learning pretrained weights github
Innovative.pretrained_notes: ISMRM conference poster only. No public code repository or pretrained weights found.

Patch2Self.searched_for: Patch2Self pretrained weights MRI denoising github
Patch2Self.pretrained_notes: Algorithm is self-supervised and regression-based (no neural network weights). Official standalone repo exists (NeurIPS 2020 Spotlight). Also integrated into DIPY as `dipy.denoise.patch2self` — installable via pip. No pretrained weight files needed by design.

Deep-CNN-Adaptive.searched_for: deep learning adaptive noise reduction multi-contrast MRI deep CNN soft shrinkage pretrained
Deep-CNN-Adaptive.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2019 conference abstract. No public code or pretrained weights found.

Low-Field-RobustPCA.searched_for: low field multi-contrast MRI denoising robust PCA non-local github pretrained
Low-Field-RobustPCA.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2022 abstract. Non-local robust PCA method — no learned weights needed. No public code repository found.

Noise2Average.searched_for: Noise2Average MRI denoising pretrained weights github iterative residual learning
Noise2Average.pretrained_notes: Published in Imaging Neuroscience (MIT Press, April 2026). No dedicated GitHub repository with pretrained weights found in search results. Uses transfer learning from a base CNN, but weights are not publicly released.

Diffusion-NullSpace.searched_for: diffusion null-space model zero-shot MRI denoising github pretrained weights
Diffusion-NullSpace.pretrained_notes: DDNM (ICLR 2023 Oral) — the MRI ISMRM 2025 paper applies DDNM to MRI. Pretrained diffusion models available: face images from SDEdit, general images from guided-diffusion (Google). No MRI-specific pretrained weights — uses off-the-shelf pretrained diffusion models as prior.

Self-Prior-MambaUNet.searched_for: Self-Prior Guided Mamba-UNet medical image super-resolution github pretrained weights
Self-Prior-MambaUNet.pretrained_notes: arXiv preprint (2407.05993, July 2024). No official GitHub repository found in search results. Paper tested on IXI and fastMRI datasets but no public code or weights released.

NNDnet.searched_for: NNDnet native noise denoising network MRI github pretrained
NNDnet.pretrained_notes: Published in Frontiers in Neuroimaging (April 2025). U-Net based denoiser trained on M4Raw (0.3T), in vivo brain (0.05T), and phantom datasets. No public GitHub repository or pretrained weight files found.

Dual-Stage-ZeroShot.searched_for: dual-stage denoising zero-shot learning low-field MRI github pretrained
Dual-Stage-ZeroShot.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2025 abstract. No public code or pretrained weights found.

NRAE-DualStage.searched_for: NRAE dual stage MRI image restoration blind spot denoising hybrid attention GAN github
NRAE-DualStage.pretrained_notes: Conference paper. No public GitHub repository or pretrained weights found.

Coil2Coil.searched_for: Coil-to-Coil C2C self-supervised MRI denoising phased-array github pretrained weights
Coil2Coil.pretrained_notes: Paper arXiv:2208.07552. Related self-supervised multi-coil denoising code available at utcsilab/gsure-diffusion-mri (MRM 2025). Original C2C specific repo not found — that repo covers a related but distinct method. No pretrained weight files confirmed for original C2C.

NonLocal-NLPCA.searched_for: improved non-local PCA denoising diffusion MRI two-step github pretrained
NonLocal-NLPCA.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2024 abstract. Algorithm is PCA-based (no neural network weights). No public code found.

HybridPCA.searched_for: Hybrid-PCA MRI denoising Marchenko-Pastur random matrix theory github code
HybridPCA.pretrained_notes: Related RMT/MP-PCA repos available: NYU-DiffusionMRI/mppca_denoise, Neurophysics-CFIN/MP-PCA-Denoising, ujnarx/rmt-denoising-mri. Algorithm is PCA-based (no learned neural network weights needed). Code is available but no pretrained DL weights.

Noise2Noise-MRI.searched_for: Noise2Noise MRI diffusion weighted imaging deep learning github pretrained weights N2N-MRI
Noise2Noise-MRI.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2019 abstract. A community N2N-MRI implementation exists at github.com/foolish0/n2n with training code (no pretrained weights bundled). Official NVlabs/noise2noise has TensorFlow weights for natural images only. No MRI-specific pretrained weights found.

NonLocal-LowRank-DWI.searched_for: non-local low rank denoising complex-valued DWI MRI two-step github pretrained
NonLocal-LowRank-DWI.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2022 abstract. Algorithm is matrix-rank based (no neural network weights). No public code found.

MD-S2S.searched_for: self-supervised learning denoising multidimensional MRI data github pretrained weights
MD-S2S.pretrained_notes: Published MRM 2024. Official GitHub repo found: B9Kang/MD-S2S-Multidimensional-Self2Self. Self-supervised method trained on noisy data — pretrained weights may be included in the repo (self-supervised, so weights are data-dependent; repo contains training code).

Rep2Rep.searched_for: Rep2Rep Repetition-to-Repetition self-supervised MRI denoising low-field github pretrained
Rep2Rep.pretrained_notes: Published in Magnetic Resonance in Medicine (2026, arXiv:2504.17698). No GitHub repository link found in search results. Authors are Nikola Janjušević et al. No public pretrained weights found.

PGDNet.searched_for: PGDNet proximal gradient descent unrolled network MRI denoising deblurring github
PGDNet.pretrained_notes: PGD-Net repo (edongdongchen/PGD-Net, MICCAI 2020) is for MR Fingerprinting, not the specific ISMRM 2023 denoising/deblurring paper. Related unrolled network code exists but the exact paper's implementation was not found with confirmed pretrained weights for denoising/deblurring task.

Multispectral-NLM.searched_for: multispectral nonlocal means MRI rotations reflections denoising github pretrained
Multispectral-NLM.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2019 abstract. Classical signal-processing method (no neural network weights). No public code repository found.

DeepImagePrior-MRI.searched_for: Deep Image Prior MRI denoising super-resolution unsupervised github pretrained
DeepImagePrior-MRI.pretrained_notes: Method uses Deep Image Prior (DIP) — network parameters are optimized per image (no transferable pretrained weights). The original DIP repo (ulyanov/deep-image-prior) is available on GitHub. No MRI-specific pretrained weights by design.

Deform-Mamba.searched_for: Deform-Mamba MRI super-resolution MICCAI 2024 github code official repository
Deform-Mamba.pretrained_notes: MICCAI 2024 paper (arXiv:2407.05969, authors: Zexin Ji et al.). Listed in Awesome-MICCAI-2024 collection but no direct GitHub repo link found. No pretrained weights confirmed.

Corruption2Self.searched_for: Corruption2Self C2S score-based self-supervised MRI denoising github huggingface 2025
Corruption2Self.pretrained_notes: arXiv:2505.05631, ICLR 2025 accepted. Official GitHub repo exists (JiachenTu/Corruption2Self-Self-Supervised-Denoising) but code was noted as 'coming soon' at time of paper release (May 2025). Self-supervised approach — pretrained weights are data-specific. Tested on M4Raw and fastMRI.

AgentMRI.searched_for: AgentMRI self-regulating MRI reconstruction multiple degradations VLM paper 2025 github
AgentMRI.pretrained_notes: Published in Journal of Imaging Informatics in Medicine (2025), DOI:10.1007/s10278-025-01617-0. No public GitHub repository or pretrained weights found. System relies on commercial VLMs for corruption detection.

Variational-Diffusion-SR.searched_for: variational diffusion model MRI super-resolution k-space guided github pretrained
Variational-Diffusion-SR.pretrained_notes: ISMRM 2023 abstract. Related diffusion-based SR repos found (CDiffMR, DiffMSR, K-space Cold Diffusion) but not for this specific variational diffusion + k-space guided method. No public code confirmed.
